title: coleus dichotomus
intro: Coleus dichotomus, also known as Coleus aromaticus or Coleus scutellarioides, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleus dichotomus include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of the Coleus dichotomus plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat a variety of ailments.
